ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "track_danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "track_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "track_energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "track_instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "track_key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "track_liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "track_loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "track_mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "track_speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "track_time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "track_valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "track_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "track_producer" TEXT /* Producer of the track */,
  "track_recording_studio" TEXT /* Recording studio of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "album_recording_studio" TEXT /* Recording studio of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_create_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_albums" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "album_id")
)
column_names: ID of the artist who created the track
Duration of the track in milliseconds
ID of the artist who created the album
ID of the user who created the playlist
Order of the track in the playlist
Type of engagement (e.g., play, like, share)
